book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
That the secrets of God cannot be seen through, and therefore that our faith ought to be simple.

ccel.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

title: That the secrets of God cannot be seen through, and therefore that our faith ought to be simple.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the secrets of God cannot be seen through, and therefore that our faith ought to be simple.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the first Epistle of Paul to the Corinthians: “We see now through the glass in an enigma, but then with face to face.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Now I know partly; but then I shall know even as also I am known.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in Solomon, in Wisdom: “And in simplicity of heart seek Him.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the same: “He who walketh with simplicity, walketh trustfully.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the same: “Seek not things higher than thyself, and look not into things stronger than thyself.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in Solomon: “Be not excessively righteous, and do not reason more than is required.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in Isaiah: “Woe unto them who are convicted in themselves.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Maccabees: “Daniel in his simplicity was delivered from the mouth of the lions.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Epistle of Paul to the Romans: “Oh the depth of the riches of the wisdom and knowledge of God!

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: How incomprehensible are His judgments, and how unsearchable are His ways!

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: For who has known the mind of the Lord? or who has been His counsellor? or who has first given to Him, and it shall be recompensed to him again?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Because from Him, and through Him, and in Him, are all things: to Him be glory for ever and ever.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also to Timothy: “But foolish and unlearned questions avoid, knowing that they generate strifes.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: But the servant of God ought not to strive, but to be gentle towards all men.”
